page.layoutStructure: No domain-level layout; uses root src/app/layout.tsx only
page.serverVsClientComponents: All 'use client' — no Server Components used in domain pages
page.metadataManagement: None in domain pages; root layout.tsx uses static export const metadata
page.loadingErrorUI: No loading.tsx or error.tsx files found anywhere

component.directoryStructure: Flat: src/components/ComponentName.tsx — no subdirectories per component
component.componentStructure: Functional components only; no forwardRef or memo usage observed
component.propsTypeDefinition: interface for props (e.g., interface Props { score: number | null | undefined; size?: number; label?: string; })
component.stateManagement: useState only; no useReducer or external state library
component.stylingApproach: Inline styles exclusively (style={{ ... }}) in master/page.tsx; no CSS modules or utility classes
component.stylingImport: No styling utility import — all styles are inline style objects
component.uiLibraryImport: No UI library used — all UI is hand-rolled with inline styles and SVG
component.reusePatterns: Composition via named exports (inkCategorySlices from InkDonutChart); small helper components defined inline (LabBox, ColorChip)
component.accessibility: No ARIA attributes or semantic HTML; uses div-heavy layouts with inline style only

dataFetching.serverSide: None — all data fetching is client-side
dataFetching.clientSide: useEffect + axios instance from @/lib/api; Promise.all for parallel fetches
dataFetching.apiRoutes: None — all calls go to external FastAPI backend at NEXT_PUBLIC_API_URL (default: http://localhost:8001)
dataFetching.cachingStrategy: No caching; plain axios fetch on mount
dataFetching.errorLoadingHandling: Minimal — try/catch with console.error; loading state via useState boolean

stateManagement.globalState: None — all state is local useState
stateManagement.formState: Uncontrolled form state via generic form: useState<any>({}); tab-based form initialization with openNewForm()

config.envVars: NEXT_PUBLIC_API_URL used in src/lib/api.ts; no other env vars observed
config.nextConfig: Not inspected directly; no domain-specific config

specialPatterns: labToRgb color conversion function is DUPLICATED: defined inline at top of master/page.tsx AND exported from src/lib/color.ts — inconsistency
Tab-based multi-entity CRUD: single page manages 6 entity types (inks, plates, pads, base_colors, white_refs, recipes) via tab state
renderField() helper renders form inputs dynamically by field key and type — a mini form-builder pattern
Inline sub-components (LabBox) defined inside the page function — not extracted to separate files
CATEGORY_LABELS / CATEGORY_COLORS lookup maps duplicated between master/page.tsx and InkDonutChart.tsx
Pure SVG visualization components with no external chart library (OpacityGauge: semicircle gauge, InkDonutChart: donut chart)
antiPatterns: form state typed as useState<any>({}) — loses type safety for all form operations
labToRgb duplicated: master/page.tsx defines its own copy instead of importing from @/lib/color
CATEGORY_LABELS / CATEGORY_COLORS constants duplicated across files
console.error used for error handling instead of user-visible feedback
No error boundary or error.tsx — unhandled API errors silently fail
No loading skeleton — blank render until data arrives
Very large single file (master/page.tsx exceeds 800-line guideline significantly)
No accessibility: no ARIA roles, labels, or keyboard navigation on interactive elements
Inline styles throughout instead of consistent Tailwind (used in page.tsx home) or CSS modules

page.layoutStructure: No domain-level layout; uses root layout only
page.loadingErrorUI: Inline loading state rendered via conditional return; no loading.tsx

component.entryFilePattern: N/A — no separate component files for this domain
component.directoryStructure: All UI inlined within the single page file
component.propsTypeDefinition: interface DashboardStats with nested sub-interfaces defined at file top
component.componentClassification: Page component only; no sub-components extracted
component.reusePatterns: None — all rendering logic inlined with .map() in JSX
component.accessibility: No ARIA, no semantic elements beyond h1/h2; color coding for ΔE values

dataFetching.errorLoadingHandling: try/catch with console.error; setLoading(false) in finally-equivalent block

specialPatterns: labToRgb imported from @/lib/color (correct usage unlike master/page.tsx)
ΔE threshold-based color coding: <1 green, 1-3 blue, 3-6 amber, >=6 red — consistent across files
Inline bar chart for ΔE distribution using CSS width percentage with transition animation
Recent patterns and samples rendered as clickable list items with router.push() navigation
antiPatterns: All UI inlined in one component — no extracted sub-components (stat cards, distribution bars, list items)
console.error with no user-visible error message on fetch failure
No error state displayed to user if API call fails — page stays in loading state or shows null
Hardcoded Korean locale string ('ko-KR') inline rather than in a config constant
No empty state handling for null stats object vs loading state distinction

page.loadingErrorUI: Button disabled state during loading; no loading.tsx; alert() on error

component.directoryStructure: All UI inlined in page file
component.propsTypeDefinition: Multiple interfaces: InkResult, SampleResult, ComplementaryResult, MethodInfo
component.stateManagement: Multiple useState hooks: L/a/b inputs, method, targetLightness, topN, result, loading, compareResults, showCompare
component.componentClassification: Page component with form + results display
component.accessibility: Native HTML inputs (type=number, select, range); no ARIA; alert() for validation

dataFetching.clientSide: api.post('/api/complementary/calculate') via axios; Promise.all for 3-method parallel comparison
dataFetching.errorLoadingHandling: try/catch with alert() for user-visible errors; finally block resets loading

stateManagement.urlState: None — no persistence of Lab values or method in URL
stateManagement.formState: Individual useState per input field (L, a, b, method, targetLightness, topN)

specialPatterns: 3-method parallel comparison using Promise.all across all complementary calculation methods
Live color preview of input Lab values before submission (previewColor computed from state)
Overlapping circle preview ('겹침 미리보기') using position:absolute circles with opacity:0.7
ink_items typed as any[] — intentional loose typing for recipe ink items
methodLabel() helper maps method keys to Korean display names
antiPatterns: alert() used for both validation and error feedback — poor UX, blocks UI thread
ink_items?: any[] — type safety lost for ink item arrays
Lab input state split into 3 separate useState (L, a, b) instead of a single object state
URL state not used — users cannot share/bookmark a specific Lab color calculation
No debounce on live preview — recalculates labToRgb on every keystroke
console.error not called on failures — only alert() shown, no logging

crossDomainCommon.description: Patterns commonly used across all three domains

patterns.name: All pages are Client Components
patterns.detail: 'use client' directive at top of every page file; no Server Components in any domain page

patterns.name: Axios via shared @/lib/api
patterns.detail: All API calls use the singleton axios instance from src/lib/api.ts; baseURL from NEXT_PUBLIC_API_URL env var

patterns.name: Inline style-only approach in domain pages
patterns.detail: master, dashboard, complementary all use inline style={{ }} objects exclusively; the home page (src/app/page.tsx) uses Tailwind CSS classes — inconsistency across the app

patterns.name: Default export functional components
patterns.detail: All pages and components use default export; no named exports for page components

patterns.name: useEffect + useState for data fetching
patterns.detail: No SWR or TanStack Query; all data loaded in useEffect on mount with a loading boolean state

patterns.name: useRouter for navigation
patterns.detail: All domain pages use useRouter().push() for navigation; router imported from 'next/navigation'

patterns.name: ΔE color thresholds: <1 #10b981, 1-3 #3b82f6, 3-6 #f59e0b, >=6 #ef4444
patterns.detail: Consistent color coding for ΔE quality levels across dashboard and complementary pages

patterns.name: labToRgb color utility
patterns.detail: Used in all three domains; correctly imported from @/lib/color in dashboard and complementary; DUPLICATED inline in master/page.tsx

patterns.name: No testing
patterns.detail: No test files, test frameworks, or test configuration found anywhere in the project

patterns.name: No global state management
patterns.detail: No Zustand, Redux, Jotai, or Context API; all state is local to each page

patterns.name: No error boundary or error.tsx
patterns.detail: Errors handled minimally via console.error or alert(); no structured error UI

patterns.name: Back-to-main navigation button
patterns.detail: All domain pages have a '← 메인' button that calls router.push('/'); consistent UX pattern

patterns.name: Korean UI language
patterns.detail: All UI text, labels, and messages are in Korean (한국어)
